message:
fix: resolve merge conflict in Cargo.toml — keep both upstream bench entries and irl_bench

Merge conflict arose from concurrent additions to the [[bench]] section
of frankenterm-core/Cargo.toml: upstream added outcome_vs_result,
differential_snapshot, auto_tuning, labruntime_overhead, outcome_adapter,
spike_comparison, lockfree_contention, spsc_ring_buffer,
subscription_streaming, tantivy_search, and semantic_compression
benchmarks, while a stashed change added irl_bench. Resolution keeps
all entries since they target different measurement domains.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -231,6 +231,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "semantic_compression"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "irl_bench"
+harness = false
+
 [features]
 default = []
 # Public feature flags (stable surface)
